identity.mission: Create a resume builder that feels like a Swiss design studio tool, not a generic form filler.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Productivity Tool precision with Swiss Poster aesthetics.
Content is King: The resume content is the hero; the UI is the frame.
Negative Space: Extreme breathing room to reduce anxiety.
Contrast: High contrast for readability and impact.

mono.usage: Code snippets, Technical skills, Data values

primary.name: Deep Indigo
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Hero Backgrounds, Text High Emphasis

colors.theme_strategy: Light Mode Primary. Dark Mode available but secondary. The Light mode should feel like high-quality paper.
colors.gradients: NO generic gradients. Use subtle noise textures or solid blocks of color.

grid_system.marketing: The Tetris Grid (Mode A). Asymmetric, bold, artistic.
grid_system.app: Split Screen. Left: Editor (Scrollable), Right: Preview (Sticky/Fixed).

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16. Avoid cramped p-4 layouts.
spacing.containers: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left align text. Center align only for specific Hero moments.

style_guide.radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (6px). Avoid fully rounded 'pill' shapes for containers. Keep it sharp and professional.
style_guide.shadows: shadow-sm for cards. shadow-xl for the Resume Preview sheet (to make it pop like paper).

shadcn_customization.buttons: Sharp edges or slightly rounded. Primary: Indigo-950 text-white. Secondary: Lime-200 text-indigo-950.
shadcn_customization.inputs: High height (h-12). Background white. Border neutral-300. Focus: Ring-2 Ring-indigo-500.
shadcn_customization.cards: Flat, bordered, no shadow by default. Hover: Lift + Shadow.

specific_components.resume_preview: Must look like an A4 sheet. Aspect ratio 1:1.414. White background, drop-shadow-2xl.
specific_components.editor_form: Accordion style sections for 'Experience', 'Education' to save space.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain overlay on the background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use abstract geometric shapes (Swiss Style) in the background of the Landing Page.

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on click (0.98). Inputs glow on focus.

hero_workspace.usage: Hero Section Background or Side Image

accessibility.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance. Dark text on light background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

code_conventions.styling: Tailwind CSS for layout, Shadcn for logic.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Resume Formatter. Focus on the 'Editor' experience. It should feel like a powerful tool. The Preview should update in real-time. Use the provided images to create a professional atmosphere. Implement the 'Swiss Grid' for the landing page. Use the 'Deep Indigo' and 'Electric Lime' palette to stand out.
